name: @sdlc/copilot-dynamic-agents-poc
description: POC for creating and running on-demand agents with the GitHub Copilot SDK and Copilot CLI extensions.

scripts.smoke:sdk: node src/cli.mjs run poc-proof --task "Return one short sentence confirming this dynamic agent executed."
scripts.smoke:skills: node src/cli.mjs demo --task "Design a safe command-driven POC for dynamic agents."
